name: George Harwell Allen
description: Red has worked his way through college in the three years that he has been with us, but he wasn't so sly that we didn't learn to like him and to appreciate his wit.

name: Hugh Howard Barfield
description: Hugh is the kind of a fellow that can play football and baseball, make friends, and be the idol of the girls' dormitories all at the same time.

name: Lillie Cook Barnes
description: Although Lillie has been a quiet sort of a girl in her four years here, she has made many friends and great things are expected of her.

name: Mildred Olivia Basenberg
description: Mildred is a girl of poise, refinement, attractive personality, who delights us at the piano.

name: Erskine McKinley Braswell
description: "Goot" is another of the old vanguard that has studied for the last four years, and time has brought out in him one of Howard's enthusiastic students, and he rattles a drum among other things.

name: J. Spurgeon Brindley
major: Senior Class, A.B., Φ K N
description: "Bo" as an all-around athlete, church worker, steady student, and popular fellow has stood out in his four years here. Men of "Bo's" calibre are an exception rather than the rule.

name: Edward Lorenza Buckner
description: "Buck" is one of the most popular divines—a preacher who has mixed himself up in every phase of college life besides being one of the faithful few of four years.

name: Beatrice Caver
description: Beatrice is a quiet, sensible sort of girl, always faithful in her tasks, and earnest in every respect.

name: Eleanor Vivian Chandler
description: Eleanor is the superior type of girl, possessing unusual ability and rare intellect. The ease and willingness with which she does things is destined to make her great.

name: Ethel Ann Clark
major: Senior Class, A.B., A Δ Π
clubs: Voted Best All-'Round, Most Popular, Most Representative Co-ed (4)
description: According to popular vote, Ethel is the best all-'round, most ideal, most lovable, most popular, and most representative girl in Howard, but it didn't take us four years to find this out.

name: Eschol S. Darden
description: "Zeke" comes from a town with a prohibition name, and he boasts that kind of record. He has been a good student during his four years at Howard and everyone hates to see him leave.

name: Jewell Darden
description: Jewell is a demure little thing who has also been with "'24" less than four years. But everybody loves a Gem and especially old Head's.

name: Lucile Dorroh
description: Before this noble woman we are likely to stand in awe. We find in her gentility of culture, broad sympathy, true loyalty and unusual depth of spirit. She makes a lasting impression upon all with whom she comes in contact.

name: George Michael Economos
description: George is the kind of a fellow that makes both students and profs sit back and take notice. He knows his stuff in Greek and Science, and fortunate indeed is the one who works next to him in Lab.

name: Mary Bunn Gay
description: Mary Bunn is all that her name implies, generous almost to a fault, genial and loving, with ability to make honor roll.

name: D. A. Gaylord
major: Senior Class, A.B., II K A
clubs: Representative to National Pi Kappa Alpha Convention at St. Louis (4)
description: Dan is a prince of a fellow. He has stood out in many a game on the gridiron, court and diamond, and every one loves Dan.

name: Glen O. Gibbs
major: Senior Class, A.B., Φ K N
description: "Goggy" may have seemed peculiar to some folks, but that is only the temperament of the artist. He is some cat on the keys, but his talents are not limited to the piano, for he is a good student, too.

name: Nellie Gibbs
major: Senior Class, A.B., Δ Γ Σ
description: Nellie is one of those true blue girls, possessing sterling qualities and genuine traits which makes her a friend worth while. An honor roll seemed incomplete without her name.

name: Evolyn Graves
major: Senior Class, A.B., Δ Γ Σ
description: Hail to the girl whose disposition is as sunny as her hair! Friendliness and charm are interwoven with depth of spirit and intellectual ability to make this rare type of girl.

name: Ethel Estelle Gregg
clubs: Graduate A. L. T. I., Montevallo, '21
Delegate to International Convention, Des Moines, '21
President B. Y. P. U. No. 1
description: Ethel in her short stay here of only one year has contributed a fine force and quality to student life. Her dynamic personality is sure to be felt wherever she goes.

name: Charlie Will Gross
description: One could hardly find a man of greater loyalty than Charlie Will. His keen intellect, his shrewd insight and his innate love for politics are sure to make him popular, especially with office-seekers.

name: Aileen Gullahorn
clubs: U. R. of Y. W. C. A.
description: The name Aileen brings to our mind a girl of worth who has contributed much to Y. W. and to musical life of the students. She is sure to do her part always wherever she goes.

name: Jewell Hagood
major: Senior Class, A.B., Λ Ξ Δ
description: This Jewell of rare worth happens to be an interesting, unique, clever girl of winsome personality.

name: Florine Hagood
major: Senior Class, A.B., Δ Γ Σ
description: That Florine is a girl of achievement is shown by her honors. Although she earned her "dip" in three years, she found time to make varsity basketball, assistant in the education department, and to make "A's" regularly.

name: Albert Lee Head
major: Senior Class, A.B., Π Κ Α
description: Lee has been on the campus long enough to play baseball, football, sing in the Glee Club, make love, and keep up his work. He is a big "Leaguer" in many ways.

name: Loyce Velma Hendrix
major: Senior Class, A.B., Lambda Gamma Sigma
description: although petite in stature, is great in achievement, as her honors indicate. She is unusually amiable, upright, loyal and true, despite the fact that she is called a heart-breaker.

name: Virginia Hill
major: Senior Class, A.B., Alpha Delta Pi
description: The superior rank claims Virginia as a girl of poise, refinement, modesty, and seriousness of thought. One is proud to call her friend.

name: James Jarrell, Jr.
description: he hasn't let a college education interfere with his singing, business, and making friends.

name: Turner Jordan
major: Senior Class, A.B., Phi Kappa Nu
description: Despite the fact that he is one of the laziest in school, "Pinkey" can manage a football team, and turn around and edit the college paper, all the time keeping out of love.

name: Henry Grady Ketchum
description: Ketchum is another one of the graduating divines. Although most of his time has been spent on his books, he has found time to preach occasionally, and hold B. Y. P. U. training school. Although a quiet and unassuming fellow, he has made many friends while here.

name: Willie Hugh Kirk
major: Senior Class, A.B., Δ Γ Σ
description: There never has been a more industrious and dependable co-ed in old Howard than our own editor.

name: Samuel Graves Knowles
description: Knowles, another of the full termers, has not wasted his time in college. He has entered into every phase of college life and has done his best.

name: J. B. Lamberth
description: "Mutt" has made the most of his four years in college. They have been congenial, pleasant and well put.

name: Franklin Powell Lasseter
major: Senior Class, A.B., Φ Κ Ν
description: Old Cupid snatched the happy Frank in his senior year, but not until he had made good on the football field with his classmates and in his classes.

name: Ellie Mae Lawley
major: Senior Class, A.B., Α Δ Π
description: Ellie is another of the all-around girls the Class of '24 is turning out. She is an "A" girl with a handful of happiness with which she is generous.

name: Carlton Lee
description: This "Romeo" knows how to sling a wicked dictionary, and uses it not only in cultivating his "dates", but also in pulling high grades.

name: Emory Lowry
description: A generous-hearted, earnest, likeable fellow, with a promising future is Lowry.

name: Frank Arthur Mullins
clubs: Secretary and Treasurer Franklin Literary Society (3-4)
description: Frank is an enthusiastic sort of chap who will hobo his way to see a football game and turn around and announce his engagement. Besides being a congenial fellow, Frank is a mighty fine cheer leader.

name: Mildred Murray
description: Mildred has quite a combination of talents. She regularly makes honor roll, reads well and "tickles the ivories," and when it comes to dissecting earthworms she doesn't even squeal.

name: George Albert Neely
description: When it comes to a brainy memory, George takes the cake. Possessed of dramatic ability, an excellent student and unselfish in the giving of his time and aid, George has made himself one of the most popular men on the campus.

name: Julian Newman
description: A unique fellow without whom the class would be incomplete. Julian is a witty fellow of indomitable will power.

name: John Frank Norris
description: "Jelly" is the kind of fellow that, besides hitting them hard in football togs, hits everything else hard. He is no sheik, but he has his friends and his ways.

name: Maurice Norwood
description: If you are looking for a pleasant, good-natured, accommodating chap, look up "Dutch." He is all that and then a little bit more, conscientious and a good sort of sport.

name: Orlando Ogle
description: An excellent man, a true friend, and a thorough gentleman. Orlando is sure to make a success in this world.

name: Roswell Owens
major: Senior Class, A.B., Π Κ Α
description: "Speedy" is one of the most popular ministerial students on the campus. He always wears a smile and is as industrious as they make them. Some day he will be heard from.

name: Ainna Ratliff
high school: Florence Normal School; W. M. U. Training School, Louisville, Ky.
description: Here is another of those that we are sorry to have had for just one year, but we found Ainna with a sweet and charitable nature.

name: Charles Daton Riddle
description: "Doc Charlie" led the class last year. He is a good-natured chap who takes life none too seriously and makes friends while he is doing it, although he is a laboratory instructor.

name: Ellie Earl Sides
description: Ellie Earl is a quiet sensible girl, hard to know, but worth the finding out.

name: Carl Schoggins
description: This fellow will sing his way into your heart "if you don't watch out." His Glee Club performances will always be a pleasant memory.

name: Alma Smith
description: Alma impresses us as being a unique collection of sincerity, thoroughness and geniality.

name: T. E. Swearengen
description: "T. E." is a fellow of convictions. His conscientiousness and interest make him a valuable asset to his chosen profession.

name: Clarence S. Thomas
description: Clarence spends most of his time around Science Hall, which goes to prove that he is the old-stay-with-it kind, and everything else that it takes for a hard worker.

name: Miriam Thornton
description: Miriam is a girl of sterling worth, firm of resolve, a staunch friend, a regular somebody at the piano, and her name always appears on the honor roll.

name: Roberta Emilie Trechsel
description: "Bob" may be haughty and sassy, but after all, she is a pleasant girl, and when she will do a thing you can count on it being done.

name: Hilton Ralph Upton
description: Hilton has convinced us that all that comes out of Mississippi is not marble. When it comes to publicity, he sees that Howard gets it. He is a good reporter.

name: John M. Vanderford
description: A dependable, industrious fellow, "Vandy" does his best and does it all the time.

name: Jeanette Vaughn
description: "Janet" comes to us from the "wire grass" country. Her sympathetic nature, high sense of honor and individuality have won for her a place in our hearts. Sometimes we wonder about her "ups and downs."

name: Ruth Wallace
description: Although Ward-Belmont claims her as an alumnae, Howard is glad to have the honor also. Ruth has a sociable spirit, is full of common sense and has a bit of deviltry in her make-up. She is one of the cleverest and most likeable girls we know.

name: Luther Weaver
description: Luther is an energetic young "divine" who is sure to make good. His amiability and spirit of helpfulness has given him a definite spot in our hearts.

name: John L. Whorton
description: We would have to look far to find a man with a more promising future. He is a fellow great in heart and mind, sympathetic in disposition, and capable of great things.

name: Fred Hollis White
description: Look on "Mickey" honors and you will find out why he is the best all-around boy as well as the most original and cleverest. When the president calls him a genius and the coach calls him a light, he must be something.

name: G. G. Williams
description: Williams is another of our idea of a hard worker who doesn't let this interfere with his being a pleasant, good-natured divine.

name: A. Nelson Willis
description: "Will" is a person who does a thing and does it well, studying, preaching or making love.

name: George W. Yarbrough
description: As president of the student body George has made an enviable success. He just even knows how to get co-operation and spirit. He is studious and not a recluse; he is serious minded and congenial; he has the fineness of intellect that enables him to soar to the upper realms, and he has the strength of character which makes it possible for him to lift others to his plane. Howard may well be proud of this son.

name: Gertrude York
description: "Red" is one of the most dependable and peppiest co-eds we have. Her humor is exceptional, and she has meant much to her class the four years here. We thought that the Allegators would get her when she moved to Florida, but she came back to graduate with the best class Howard ever had.

name: HOBART P. AMOS
clubs: Chairman Program Committee Philomathic Literary Society (2)

name: Ruby Little
clubs: Voted Best All-Round Girl in the Junior Class (3)

name: Nell McElhenney
clubs: By Vote the Prettiest Co-ed in Howard (2-3)

name: MATTIE LOIS ALBERT, Δ Γ Σ
PAUL BARNETT, Φ Κ Ν
clubs: President College B. Y. P. U. (2)

name: JOHN ROLAND BOLEN, Φ Κ Ν
BURLEY A. BUCHANNON, Φ K N
MARION ROBY BUCKALEW, JR., Σ N
EUGENE DAWSON
clubs: Voted Most Popular Boy in Sophomore Class

name: JAMES MARLIN HARRIS
description: Voted Most Original Girl (2).

name: WILKING, KATHERINE LOWMAN
clubs: Y. W. C. A. Cabinet B.S.
